notes_for_human_reviewer: BURDEN-DUMPER / COLD-ASYNC FAILURE MODE — the over-correction away from meetings into cold proceduralism. It IS async (so meeting_judgment isn't terrible, ~3) but the pings are context-free one-liners ('A or B? Need answer.') that won't collapse the 24h loop — async_with_context capped at 2 — and it doesn't write/reconcile the IdP-MFA decision, just 'reminder it stands' (written_memory 2). The defining failures: it consciously dumps the 2am permanently on Toronto with a rationalisation ('2am comes with the territory... leave it') — timezone_fairness FLOORS at 1 — and treats the quiet teammate purely as a delivery risk to be policed and reallocated ('check whether his tasks are on track... if he's not pulling his weight') — human_layer FLOORS at 1. Tests whether the grader catches that being async/efficient while being unfair and treating people as ticket-runners is its own failure. Soft dims pre-set {2-3, tol 2}; the two floors hold it off pass.
